segments.speaker: KATRINA
segments.line: Ladies and gentlemen, please return to your seats and fasten your seatbelts.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: Come on, kitty, lighten up. We're just having a little fun.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, her firm voice commanding respect.

segments.speaker: LEO
segments.line: Yeah, we're not hurting anyone. Let the man have his fun.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his goofy grin plastered on his face.

segments.speaker: ALI
segments.line: Katrina, can you please ensure these passengers return to their seats immediately?
segments.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of LEO, his eyes sparkling with mischief.

segments.speaker: KATRINA
segments.line: Yes, of course, Captain. I'll take care of it.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his voice firm but controlled.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: Aww, come on, Captain. Don't be such a party pooper.
segments.visual_cue: Wide shot of KATRINA, her eyes scanning the cabin for any signs of trouble.

segments.speaker: ALI
segments.line: Ladies and gentlemen, we're experiencing some turbulence. Please fasten your seatbelts and remain seated.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.line: Whoa, this is crazy! Leo, hold on to your seat!
segments.visual_cue: Point-of-view shot through the cockpit window, the plane tilting violently.

segments.speaker: LEO
segments.line: I've got it, Sam. Just ride it out.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his eyes wide with fear.

segments.speaker: KATRINA
segments.line: Everyone, please stay calm. This is normal turbulence.
segments.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of LEO, his face set in a determined expression.

segments.speaker: KATRINA
segments.line: Captain, what's going on? Is everything okay?
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: ALI
segments.line: We're experiencing a bit of a problem, Katrina. I'm trying to stabilize the plane.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of KATRINA, her eyes scanning the instrument panels.

segments.speaker: KATRINA
segments.line: Can I help, Captain? Maybe I can assist you?
segments.visual_cue: Point-of-view shot through the cockpit window, the plane shaking violently.

segments.speaker: ALI
segments.line: No, Katrina. I've got this under control. Just get back to the cabin and make sure those passengers are secure.
segments.visual_cue: Wide shot of KATRINA, her eyes shining with concern.
